MIDNIGHT RUN – EASTER EDITION 
Mighty Rides is proud to be part of the Mutungo MAD Midnight Run – Easter Edition! 
Join us for an unforgettable night of fitness, fun, and Easter vibes under the stars 
 Thursday 2nd April 2026
Start Time: 12:01AM (3rd April) 
 Venue: Red Chilli, Butabika
 Distances: 22KM Run | 10KM & 5KM Run/Walk
Rego: 20K
Let’s run into Easter the right way!
